Title: User Registration
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page
2. Enter valid email, password, name, surname
3. Click on the "Register" button
Expected Result: User is registered and can log in

Title: User Login
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page
2. Enter valid email and password
3. Click on the "Login" button
Expected Result: User is logged in

Title: Bug Report
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the bug report page
2. Enter valid bug description and attach a screenshot
3. Click on the "Report" button
Expected Result: Bug is reported and assigned to the development team

Title: User Report
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user report page
2. Select the user to report
3. Enter valid reason for report
4. Click on the "Report" button
Expected Result: User is reported and the action is logged

Title: Notification Receiving
Test Steps:
1. A new post is created by another user
2. The user receives a notification about the new post
Expected Result: User receives a notification and can access the new post

Title: Direct Message Sending
Preconditions: User is logged in and has selected a recipient
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the direct message page
2. Select a recipient
3. Enter message text
4. Click on the "Send" button
Expected Result: Message is sent and received by the recipient

Title: Profile Viewing
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile page
2. View user's profile information
Expected Result: User can view the profile information of the selected user

Title: Post Creation
Test Data: Post title, post content, post image
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the post creation page
2. Enter post title, post content, and attach an image
3. Click on the "Create" button
Expected Result:
Post is created and visible to other users
These test cases are based on the explicit requirements written in the provided PDF. The test cases are directly supported by the PDF content and do not assume missing test steps, missing validations, or missing expected results.

Title: User Registration
Preconditions:
User has the app
Trigger: User starts the application for the first time/without registration
Test Data: Name, Surname, Date of Birth, Email, Password
Test Steps: 1. User is asked to enter Name, Surname, Date of Birth, Email, and Password.
Expected Result: User registers correctly with the service.

Title: User Registration
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "Register" button.
2. User fills in the registration form with the required details.
3. User clicks on the "Submit" button.
Expected Result: User is successfully registered and can log in to the application.

Title: User Profile View
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "Profile" icon.
2. User is redirected to the profile page.
Expected Result: User can view their personal information and change their password.

Title: User Profile Update
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "Edit Profile" button.
2. User fills in the update form with the required details.
3. User clicks on the "Update" button.
Expected Result: User details are successfully updated.

Title: User Password Reset
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "Forgot Password" link.
2. User enters their email address.
3. User receives a password reset link in their email.
4. User clicks on the password reset link and enters the new password.
Expected Result: User's password is successfully reset.

Title: User Signal Problem
Preconditions: User encounters a problem with the application
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "Report a Problem" button.
2. User fills in the problem report form with the required details.
3. User clicks on the "Submit" button.
Expected Result: Problem is successfully reported and the development team is notified.

Title: User Direct Message
Preconditions: User wants to send a direct message to another user
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "Direct Message" icon.
2. User selects the recipient user.
3. User types the message and clicks on the "Send" button.
Expected Result: Message is successfully sent to the recipient user.

Title: User View Notifications
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "Notifications" icon.
2. User views the notifications.
Expected Result: User can view and confirm that they have read the notifications.

Title: Confirmation of actions
Preconditions: User is logged in and performing an action within the app.
Test Steps:
1. User performs an action within the app.
2. The app should display a confirmation message to the user.
Expected Result: User should see a confirmation message for the action they performed.

Title: Data removal upon disinstallation
Test Steps:
1. User disinstalls the app.
2. The app should automatically remove all data associated with the app.
Expected Result: All data associated with the app should be removed upon disinstallation.

Title: Data encryption
Preconditions: User data is being stored within the app.
Test Steps:
1. User data is stored within the app.
2. The app should encrypt the data to prevent unauthorized access.
Expected Result: User data should be encrypted and inaccessible to other applications.

Title: Compatibility with Android versions
Preconditions: User is using a device with an Android version greater than 7.0.
Test Steps:
1. User launches the app on a device with an Android version greater than 7.0.
2. The app should function correctly without any compatibility issues.
Expected Result: The app should function correctly on devices with Android versions greater than 7.0.

Title: Efficient performance
Test Steps:
1. User interacts with the app.
2. The app should respond quickly and smoothly without any noticeable delays.
Expected Result: The app should provide a fast and smooth user experience.

Title: App size limit
Preconditions: User is downloading the app from Google Play.
Test Steps:
1. User downloads the app from Google Play.
2. The app should remain within the 100 MB size limit.
Expected Result: The app should not exceed the 100 MB size limit during download.

Title: User-friendly interface
Preconditions: User is interacting with the app.
Test Steps:
1. User interacts with the app.
2. The app should have a clear and intuitive interface that allows users to easily navigate and understand the app.
Expected Result: The app should have a user-friendly interface that is easy to navigate and understand.

Title: Punctuality in deliverables
Preconditions: The project has deadlines set by the course instructor.
Test Steps:
1. The project team delivers a deliverable within the set deadline.
2. The deliverable should be submitted on time.
Expected Result: Deliverables should be submitted on time according to the set deadlines.

Title: Knowledge of programming languages
Preconditions: The project team is developing the app.
Test Steps:
1. The project team develops the app using Java and XML.
2. The team should have a good understanding of these programming languages.
Expected Result: The project team should have a good understanding of Java and XML for efficient development of the app.

Title: Familiarity with Firebase database
Preconditions: The project team is developing the app.
Test Steps:
1. The project team develops the app using the Firebase database.
2. The team should be familiar with the Firebase database for efficient data management.
Expected Result: The project team should be familiar with the Firebase database for efficient data management within the app.

Title: Internet connection requirement
Test Steps:
1. User launches the app.
2. The app should require a minimum internet connection speed of 5 Mb/s.
Expected Result: The app should require a minimum internet connection speed of 5 Mb/s for proper functioning.

Title: Data security system
Preconditions: User data is being stored within the app.
Test Steps:
1. User data is stored within the app.
2. The app should implement a system to prevent data theft.
Expected Result: User data should be protected from theft using a secure data transmission and encryption system.

Title: User Authentication
Test Steps:
1. Open the app
2. Click on the "Login" or "Register" button
3. Enter the required credentials
4. Click on the "Login" or "Register" button again
Expected Result: User is able to log in or register successfully

Title: Change Password
Test Steps:
1. Go to the user profile section
2. Click on the "Change Password" button
3. Enter the old password
4. Enter the new password
5. Confirm the new password
6. Click on the "Change Password" button
Expected Result: User's password is changed successfully

Title: Report User
Preconditions: User has made a delivery with another user and wants to report that user
Test Steps:
1. Go to the user's profile
2. Click on the "Report User" button
3. Select the reason for the report
4. Click on the "Submit Report" button
Expected Result: User's report is submitted successfully

Title: Report Bug
Test Steps:
1. Go to the bug reporting section
2. Describe the bug in detail
3. Attach screenshots or videos if necessary
4. Click on the "Submit Bug Report" button
Expected Result: User's bug report is submitted successfully

Title: Notifications
Test Steps:
1. Go to the notifications section
2. Check if there are any new notifications
Expected Result: User can see new notifications if any

Title: Send Message to Seller
Preconditions: User is authenticated, there is at least one product listing
Test Steps:
1. Go to the product listing
2. Click on the "Message Seller" button
3. Write the message
4. Click on the "Send" button
Expected Result: A chat is started between the user and the seller

Title: Database Requirements
Test Steps:
1. Check if the database has the following requirements:
Real-time database
Infrastructure cloud
Servicio de backup
Sistema de criptografía
Expected Result: Database meets all the required specifications

Title: Device Requirements
Test Steps:
1. Check if the device requirements are met:
Android version 7.0 or higher
Working internet connection
Approximately 100 MB of free memory and 512 MB of RAM
Expected Result: Device meets all the required specifications

Title: Network Requirements
Test Steps:
1. Check if the network requirements are met:
Good internet coverage
Minimum internet speed of 5 Mb/s
Expected Result: Network meets all the required specifications

Title: Verify the presence of "Breaking Bad" project plan in Moodle
Preconditions: User is logged in to Moodle and enrolled in the Ingegneria del Software 2024/25 course
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Ingegneria del Software 2024/25 course page in Moodle.
2. Check if the "Breaking Bad" project plan is present in the course materials.
Expected Result: The "Breaking Bad" project plan should be present in the course materials.

Title: Verify the availability of materials provided by the professor
Preconditions: User is logged in to Moodle and enrolled in the Ingegneria del Software 2024/25 course
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Ingegneria del Software 2024/25 course page in Moodle.
2. Check if the materials provided by the professor are available for download.
Expected Result: The materials provided by the professor should be available for download.
